query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'rentals' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('contractId', 'bikeSizeId', 'quantity', 'deletedAt', 'returnCondition');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uiJuwepBaepVjU.root --database 9oQjN6PX9fNMedgfErUfQE --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'rentals' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('contractId', 'bikeSizeId', 'quantity', 'deletedAt', 'returnCondition');
